text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Arima Kinen is here. Everyone is
focused on the upcoming showdown between
Agnes Tachyon and Manhattan Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has the fruits of her research, the support of
her fans, and the motivation to beat her rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With all the reagents necessary to reach the limits
of Umamusume potential, Agnes Tachyon is ready
for the Arima Kinen!
